ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office being voted for (e.g., president) */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of voting (e.g., total, early voting) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "is_special_election" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the election is a special election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_po" TEXT /* Postal abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" INTEGER /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county (population per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the candidate */,
  "previous_elections" TEXT /* JSON array of previous elections the candidate participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the result belongs to */,
  "candidatevotes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "totalvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the result */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of voting (e.g., total, early voting) */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office in years */,
  "is_partisan" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the office is partisan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_offices" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_parties" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_photos_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_photos_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., voter registration, results report) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_documents_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
